excipients.metaTitle: Pharmaceutical Excipients Supplier Hyderab | IP BP USP Grade
excipients.metaDescription: Buy pharma-grade excipients in Hyderabad — Mannitol, Citric Acid, HPMC, PVP K30, Lactose, Sucralose & 20+ more. IP/BP/EP/USP. Ready stock. COA & MSDS....
excipients.intro: Surravi Phharma is a leading supplier of pharmaceutical excipients in Hyderabad, stocking over 24 of the most widely used formulation ingredients for the Indian pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industry. Our excipient range covers every major functional category — diluents and fillers (Mannitol, Lactose, Maltodextrin), binders (PVP K30, HPMC E5, HPMC E15), sweeteners and taste maskers (Sucralose, Aspartame, Xylitol, Fructose), acidulants and buffering agents (Citric Acid Anhydrous, Citric Acid Monohydrate, Malic Acid, Sodium Bicarbonate), glidants and lubricants (Aerosil/Colloidal Silicon Dioxide, Talc), viscosity modifiers and controlled-release polymers (Xanthan Gum, HPMC), solubility enhancers (PVP K30), and specialty nutraceutical excipients (FOS, Co-Enzyme Q10, D-Panthenol, Neomalt).
excipients.body:
All excipients are available in IP (Indian Pharmacopoeia), BP (British Pharmacopoeia), EP (European Pharmacopoeia), and USP (United States Pharmacopoeia) grades — ensuring your formulation meets the regulatory requirements of both domestic and export markets. Every batch is supplied with a full Certificate of Analysis (COA) and Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) from the manufacturer, along with grade compliance documentation.

We supply pharma manufacturers, CDMO facilities, nutraceutical brands, and R&D laboratories across Hyderabad and pan India. Whether you need lab-scale quantities for formulation development or bulk commercial orders, our team responds promptly with pricing, availability, and documentation. Hyderabad's pharmaceutical industry — spanning Genome Valley, IDA Pashamylaram, Nacharam, and Patancheru — is one of our primary served markets, and we maintain ready stock of the most critical excipients to ensure no production delays.
excipients.closing: Looking to buy Mannitol IP grade, PVP K30 USP, HPMC E5 pharma grade, or Citric Acid Anhydrous in Hyderabad? Contact Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 or WhatsApp for same-day pricing and stock confirmation.

vitamins.metaTitle: Pharmaceutical Vitamins Raw Material Supplier Hy | IP BP USP
vitamins.metaDescription: Buy pharmaceutical vitamin raw materials in Hyderabad — Biotin, B1, B2, B6, B12, Vitamin C, A, D2, D3, E. IP/BP/EP/USP grade. Ready stock. COA & MSDS....
vitamins.h1: Pharmaceutical Vitamins — Raw Material Supplier in Hyderabad
vitamins.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies a comprehensive range of pharmaceutical-grade vitamin raw materials in Hyderabad, covering the full B-complex group, fat-soluble vitamins, and specialty nutraceutical vitamins. Our vitamin range includes Biotin (Vitamin B7), Thiamine HCl (Vitamin B1), Riboflavin (Vitamin B2), Pyridoxine HCl (Vitamin B6), Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12), Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), Retinyl Palmitate (Vitamin A), Ergocalciferol (Vitamin D2), Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3), and Tocopherol/Tocopheryl Acetate (Vitamin E) — all available in IP, BP, EP, and USP pharmacopoeial grades.
vitamins.body:
Vitamins are among the highest-demand raw materials in India's nutraceutical and pharmaceutical sectors. B-complex vitamins (B1, B2, B6, B12, Biotin) are the building blocks of multivitamin tablets, energy supplements, neurological health products, and prenatal vitamins. Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) is one of the largest-volume vitamin ingredients used in effervescent tablets, immunity supplements, and food fortification. Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) is critical in Calcium + D3 combination tablets — one of India's highest-selling OTC pharmaceutical products.

All vitamin raw materials are supplied with manufacturer COA confirming potency (IU/g or % assay), loss on drying, heavy metal limits, and pharmacopoeial compliance. We supply vitamins to pharmaceutical companies formulating prescription and OTC products, nutraceutical brands launching D2C supplement lines, contract manufacturers handling vitamin blending, and research institutions conducting stability and bioavailability studies.
vitamins.closing: Looking to buy Vitamin D3 Cholecalciferol IP grade, Biotin USP, Vitamin B12 Cyanocobalamin pharma grade, or Vitamin C Ascorbic Acid in Hyderabad? Call +91 8008002576 or WhatsApp Surravi Phharma for pricing and COA.

colours.metaTitle: Pharmaceutical & Food Colours Supplier Hyderaba | Dye & Lake
colours.metaDescription: Buy pharmaceutical colours in Hyderabad — Iron Oxides, Titanium Dioxide, Sunset Yellow, Tartrazine, Brilliant Blue, Lake colours & more. Pharma & food...
colours.h1: Pharmaceutical & Food Colours — Supplier in Hyderabad
colours.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies a complete range of pharmaceutical and food-grade colours in Hyderabad, covering inorganic pigments (Titanium Dioxide, Red/Yellow/Black Iron Oxide, Mica) and synthetic organic dyes (Sunset Yellow E110, Erythrosine E127, Ponceau 4R E124, Tartrazine E102, Brilliant Blue E133, Quinoline Yellow E104, Allura Red E129) — all available in both water-soluble dye form and water-insoluble aluminium lake form. This dual availability means we can supply the right form for any pharmaceutical coating system or food application.
colours.body:
Pharmaceutical colours are tightly regulated ingredients. All synthetic dyes and inorganic pigments we supply are listed in the Indian Pharmacopoeia (IP) and comply with BP, EP, and USP specifications. Every lot is accompanied by a manufacturer COA confirming dye content (%), heavy metal limits (arsenic, lead, mercury), and batch-specific test results. Our iron oxide range (Red Fe₂O₃, Yellow FeO(OH), Black Fe₃O₄) is the standard pigment set for HPMC and Opadry film coating systems used across India's tablet manufacturing industry.

For formulators and coating technicians: we supply all colours in both dye (water-soluble, for sugar coatings and oral liquids) and lake (water-insoluble aluminium lake, for film coatings and oil-based preparations) forms. Aluminium lake pigments are the standard for modern aqueous film coating — they prevent colour migration, provide better light stability, and are compatible with all commercial coating systems including Opadry, Sepifilm, Aquacoat, and Surelease. Titanium Dioxide is stocked in both pharma grade (IP/USP) and food grade (E171) for respective applications.
colours.closing: Looking to buy Titanium Dioxide IP grade, Lake Tartrazine, Sunset Yellow FCF, Red Iron Oxide USP, or Brilliant Blue Lake in Hyderabad? Contact Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 for pricing, grade confirmation, and COA.

phosphates.metaTitle: Phosphates & Calcium Carbonates Supplier | Pharma Food Grade
phosphates.metaDescription: Buy DCP, TCP, Monosodium Phosphate, Disodium Phosphate, Calcium Carbonate in Hyderabad. IP/BP/EP/USP & food grade. Ready stock. COA & MSDS. Call +91...
phosphates.h1: Phosphates & Calcium Carbonates — Pharma & Food Grade Supplier, Hyderabad
phosphates.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies a complete range of pharmaceutical and food-grade phosphate and carbonate salts in Hyderabad — covering Dicalcium Phosphate Anhydrous (DCP), Dicalcium Phosphate Dihydrate, Disodium Phosphate Anhydrous, Disodium Phosphate Dihydrate, Monosodium Phosphate Anhydrous, Monosodium Phosphate Monohydrate, Monosodium Phosphate Dihydrate, Tricalcium Phosphate (TCP), Monocalcium Phosphate Anhydrous (MCP), Heavy Calcium Carbonate, and Light Calcium Carbonate. All grades comply with IP, BP, EP, and USP pharmacopoeial standards and are available in food-grade (FSSAI/INS) specifications where applicable.
phosphates.body:
Phosphate and carbonate excipients serve multiple critical roles across the pharmaceutical and food industries. Dicalcium Phosphate (DCP Anhydrous and Dihydrate) is one of the most widely used tablet diluents in India — its combination of high compressibility, low cost, and dual function as a calcium mineral source makes it the standard filler in calcium supplement tablets and multivitamin formulations. Tricalcium Phosphate (TCP) provides the highest elemental calcium content (38.8%) of any calcium phosphate salt and is used in bone health products, anticaking applications, and dental care.

Sodium phosphate salts (Monosodium, Disodium) form the backbone of pharmaceutical buffer systems used in injectable formulations, ophthalmic preparations, and oral liquids requiring precise pH control. Monocalcium Phosphate (MCP) is the standard acidic leavening agent in baking, reacting with sodium bicarbonate to generate CO₂. Calcium Carbonate — available in both Heavy grade (preferred for direct compression tablets) and Light grade (preferred for suspensions and toothpaste) — is simultaneously an antacid API, a calcium supplement source, and a food fortification ingredient.

All phosphate and carbonate products are supplied with full COA, MSDS, and pharmacopoeial compliance statements. We serve pharmaceutical tablet manufacturers, injectable formulation companies, nutraceutical brands, and food manufacturers across Hyderabad and pan India.
phosphates.closing: Looking to buy DCP Anhydrous IP grade, Tricalcium Phosphate USP, Disodium Phosphate pharma grade, or Heavy Calcium Carbonate in Hyderabad? Call Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 or WhatsApp for same-day pricing and stock confirmation.

amino-acids.metaTitle: Amino Acids Supplier Hyd | Pharma Nutraceutical Grade IP USP
amino-acids.metaDescription: Buy amino acids in Hyderabad — L-Arginine, L-Leucine, L-Carnitine, BCAA, Alpha Lipoic Acid, L-Tryptophan & more. IP/BP/USP grade. Ready stock. Call +91...
amino-acids.h1: Amino Acids — Pharma & Nutraceutical Grade Supplier, Hyderabad
amino-acids.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies 12 pharmaceutical and nutraceutical-grade amino acids in Hyderabad — Alpha Lipoic Acid, L-Proline, L-Valine, L-Phenylalanine, L-Arginine, L-Leucine, L-Tryptophan, L-Serine, L-Carnitine, L-Alanine, L-Threonine, and L-Isoleucine. All amino acids are supplied in IP, BP, EP, and USP grades with full optical purity certification (specific rotation), assay, and heavy metal documentation. We stock the most critical amino acids for sports nutrition, parenteral nutrition (TPN), and nutraceutical health supplement manufacturing in India.
amino-acids.body:
Amino acids are among the fastest-growing raw material categories in India's supplement industry. The BCAA trio — L-Leucine, L-Isoleucine, and L-Valine — forms the core of every sports nutrition product targeting muscle recovery and protein synthesis. L-Leucine is the most anabolic of the three, directly activating mTOR-mediated protein synthesis, and is supplied in the standard 2:1:1 ratio blend or as individual ingredients for custom BCAA formulations.

L-Arginine is the most widely used amino acid in cardiovascular and male health supplements, as the sole precursor to nitric oxide (NO) — the vasodilatory molecule central to blood flow and erectile function nutraceuticals. L-Carnitine is the premier fat metabolism and energy supplement ingredient, clinically validated for weight management, cardiovascular health, and male fertility. L-Tryptophan is the only dietary precursor to serotonin and melatonin, making it the key ingredient in natural sleep quality and mood support supplements. Alpha Lipoic Acid (ALA), while technically a fatty acid rather than a classic amino acid, is stocked in this range as a universal antioxidant — uniquely active in both fat and water soluble compartments — used in diabetic neuropathy treatment and anti-aging supplements.

All amino acids are supplied with specific rotation testing to confirm the L-form (biologically active enantiomer) and are free from D-isomer contamination. Parenteral-grade amino acids meeting USP endotoxin specifications are available on request for TPN formulation manufacturers.
amino-acids.closing: Looking to buy L-Arginine USP, L-Leucine IP, L-Carnitine pharma grade, BCAA raw materials, or Alpha Lipoic Acid in Hyderabad? Contact Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 for pricing, COA, and availability.

oils-butters.metaTitle: Pharmaceutical Oils & Cosmetic Butters Supplier | USP Grade
oils-butters.metaDescription: Buy pharmaceutical oils & cosmetic butters in Hyderabad — MCT Oil, Flaxseed Oil, Shea Butter, Cocoa Butter, Soya Bean Oil USP & more. Ready stock. Call...
oils-butters.h1: Pharmaceutical Oils & Cosmetic Butters — Supplier in Hyderabad
oils-butters.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies a curated range of pharmaceutical-grade oils and cosmetic-grade butters in Hyderabad — MCT Oil USP, Flaxseed Oil USP, Soya Bean Oil USP, Sunflower Oil USP, Safflower Oil USP, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil USP, Shea Butter, Mango Butter, Cocoa Butter, and Aloe Butter. This range serves pharmaceutical softgel manufacturers, parenteral nutrition formulators, nutraceutical brands, cosmetic manufacturers, and Ayurvedic product manufacturers across Hyderabad and pan India.
oils-butters.body:
Pharmaceutical-grade oils (USP/BP specification) are a distinct category from food-grade or cosmetic-grade oils — they meet strict purity standards for acid value, peroxide value, iodine value, saponification value, and are free from foreign oils (verified by GC fatty acid profiling). These specifications are mandatory for pharmaceutical softgel capsule fills, oral oily solutions, injectable lipid emulsions (TPN), and topical pharmaceutical preparations.

MCT Oil USP is our highest-demand oil, used as both a pharmaceutical carrier for lipophilic APIs and as a ketogenic dietary supplement ingredient. Its C8/C10 fractionated composition provides rapid metabolic energy, making it the core ingredient in keto supplement products. Soya Bean Oil USP is the primary oil used in intravenous fat emulsions (Intralipid-type products) for TPN applications. Flaxseed Oil USP delivers the highest plant-based omega-3 ALA content (>50%) for vegan omega-3 softgel formulations.

Cosmetic butters — Shea, Mango, Cocoa, and Aloe — are supplied to pharmaceutical topical product manufacturers, cosmetic brands, and Ayurvedic FMCG companies. Shea Butter and Mango Butter are used in skin moisturiser creams, lip care products, and baby care formulations. Cocoa Butter (Theobroma Oil) remains the classical pharmaceutical suppository base listed in IP, BP, and USP. Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil USP serves the dual role of tablet lubricant and sustained-release matrix former in modified-release tablet manufacturing.
oils-butters.closing: Looking to buy MCT Oil USP, Soya Bean Oil pharma grade, Shea Butter cosmetic grade, Cocoa Butter IP grade, or Flaxseed Oil in Hyderabad? Call Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 or WhatsApp for pricing and COA.

food-nutra.metaTitle: Food & Nutraceutical Raw Materials Supplier | Proteins Gums
food-nutra.metaDescription: Buy food & nutraceutical raw materials in Hyderabad — Whey Protein WPC/WPI, Pea Protein, Rice Protein, Xanthan Gum, Tara Gum, Cocoa Powder & more. Call...
food-nutra.h1: Food & Nutraceutical Raw Materials — Supplier in Hyderabad
food-nutra.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies a wide range of food and nutraceutical raw materials in Hyderabad — including Skimmed Milk Powder (SMP), Rice Protein, Pea Protein, Whey Protein Concentrate (WPC 80), Whey Protein Isolate (WPI 90), Hydrolysed Whey Protein (WPH), Soya Protein Isolate, Food Grade Titanium Dioxide (E171), Food Grade Xanthan Gum (E415), Tara Gum (E417), Potassium Sorbate (E202), Food Grade Sodium Bicarbonate, and Cocoa Powder. This range serves sports nutrition brands, functional food manufacturers, bakery ingredient companies, and nutraceutical product developers across India.
food-nutra.body:
Protein raw materials represent the highest-value segment of India's booming nutraceutical market. Whey Protein Concentrate (WPC 80) is the backbone of the Indian sports nutrition industry — used in protein powders, bars, and ready-to-drink shakes targeting the country's rapidly growing gym and fitness consumer base. For premium lean muscle and lactose-sensitive formulations, Whey Protein Isolate (WPI 90) is specified. Hydrolysed Whey Protein (WPH) is the choice for rapid post-workout recovery formulations and clinical nutrition products where fast amino acid delivery is critical.

The plant-based protein segment is growing rapidly in India, driven by vegetarian demographics and vegan lifestyle adoption. We supply Pea Protein Isolate, Rice Protein Concentrate, and Soya Protein Isolate — covering the full plant protein spectrum. The industry-standard Pea + Rice protein blend (60:40) produces a complete amino acid profile comparable to whey, making it the leading vegan protein formulation base.

Food hydrocolloids and functional ingredients round out this category. Food Grade Xanthan Gum (E415) is the essential thickener and stabiliser for gluten-free bakery, salad dressings, and beverage products. Tara Gum (E417) serves as a clean-label alternative to modified starches in dairy products and frozen foods. Potassium Sorbate (E202) is the standard mould and yeast preservative across Indian food manufacturing. Cocoa Powder — available in natural (acidic) and Dutch process (alkalized) variants — supplies the confectionery, bakery, and nutraceutical beverage segments.
food-nutra.closing: Looking to buy WPC 80, WPI 90, Pea Protein Isolate, Xanthan Gum food grade, or Cocoa Powder in Hyderabad? Contact Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 or WhatsApp for bulk pricing, samples, and COA.

flavours.metaTitle: Pharmaceutical & Food Flavours Supplier Hy | Powder & Liquid
flavours.metaDescription: Buy pharmaceutical flavours in Hyderabad — Mango, Strawberry, Vanilla, Mixed Fruit, Apple, Pineapple (powder & liquid). For syrups, sachets, ORS. Call...
flavours.h1: Pharmaceutical & Food Flavours — Supplier in Hyderabad
flavours.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies pharmaceutical and food-grade flavours in Hyderabad in both powder (spray-dried) and liquid forms — covering Mango, Strawberry, Vanilla, Mixed Fruit, Apple, and Pineapple. All flavours are available in natural, natural-identical, and artificial variants, in water-soluble and oil-soluble grades, to match the specific requirements of aqueous pharmaceutical preparations, oil-based formulations, dry powder sachets, effervescent tablets, and solid dosage forms.
flavours.body:
Flavours are a critical formulation tool in pharmaceutical oral preparations — particularly for paediatric medicines, ORS (oral rehydration solutions), chewable tablets, effervescent sachets, and nutraceutical powders where patient compliance depends directly on taste acceptability. India's pharmaceutical oral liquid market is one of the largest in the world, and flavour selection is a key differentiator in a highly competitive generic market.

Mango and Strawberry are the two highest-demand flavours for paediatric pharmaceutical formulations in India — Mango for its universal appeal across all age groups and regions, Strawberry for its proven efficacy in masking bitter antibiotic tastes (amoxicillin, azithromycin, metronidazole). Vanilla Flavour (Vanillin/Ethyl Vanillin) is the most widely used flavour in protein supplement formulations and pharmaceutical tablet coatings. Mixed Fruit Flavour is the standard choice for ORS formulations where a broad, non-polarising tropical taste profile is needed. Apple Flavour (Green Apple) is popular in effervescent products and sports nutrition beverages. Pineapple Flavour brings a distinctive tropical character to nutraceutical sachets and paediatric vitamins.

All flavours are supplied with COA confirming organoleptic properties, GC profile for authenticity, heavy metal limits, and microbiological purity. Stability data in common pharmaceutical vehicles (syrup base, effervescent base) is available on request. We supply minimum quantities suitable for formulation trials through to bulk commercial quantities.
flavours.closing: Looking to buy Mango Flavour powder pharma grade, Strawberry Flavour liquid, Vanilla Flavour (Vanillin), or Mixed Fruit Flavour for ORS in Hyderabad? Contact Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 for pricing, samples, and documentation.

empty-capsules.metaTitle: Empty Capsules Supplier Hyd | Gelatin & HPMC Capsules IP USP
empty-capsules.metaDescription: Buy empty gelatin and HPMC capsules in Hyderabad — sizes 00 to 5, plain & coloured, IP/BP/USP grade, USFDA-approved plants. Ready stock. COA provided....
empty-capsules.h1: Empty Capsules (Gelatin & HPMC) — Supplier in Hyderabad
empty-capsules.intro: Surravi Phharma supplies empty hard capsule shells in Hyderabad — both Gelatin (animal-derived) and HPMC (Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, vegetarian) capsules manufactured at USFDA-approved facilities. Available in the complete size range from Size 00 (largest, ~750 mg fill capacity) to Size 5 (smallest, ~100 mg fill capacity), in plain transparent and coloured options, with pharmacopoeial compliance to IP, BP, EP, and USP standards. Empty capsules are stored in our centralised, air-conditioned warehouse to maintain moisture content and dimensional stability.
empty-capsules.body:
Empty hard capsules are one of the most widely used oral dosage forms in the Indian pharmaceutical industry — used by both large pharmaceutical manufacturers and small nutraceutical brands for filling powders, granules, pellets, and mini-tablets. The choice between gelatin and HPMC capsules depends on the product's target market, API characteristics, and consumer preferences.

Gelatin capsules are the industry standard for most pharmaceutical applications — they have a long regulatory history, excellent machinability on high-speed capsule filling machines, and are highly cost-effective. They are derived from bovine or porcine collagen and are not suitable for halal, kosher, vegetarian, or vegan-certified products. HPMC capsules (also called veggie caps or vegetarian capsules) are the preferred choice for nutraceutical brands, Ayurvedic products, and any formulation targeting vegetarian, vegan, halal, or kosher consumers. HPMC capsules also have lower moisture content than gelatin, making them suitable for moisture-sensitive APIs.

All capsules we supply are manufactured at USFDA-inspected and approved plants, ensuring compliance with global pharmaceutical manufacturing standards. Each batch comes with a full COA covering dimensions, disintegration time, moisture content, microbial limits, and pharmacopoeial compliance. We supply pharmaceutical companies, CDMO facilities, Ayurvedic manufacturers, and nutraceutical brands across Hyderabad — from trial quantities for new product development to commercial bulk orders.
empty-capsules.closing: Looking to buy HPMC empty capsules Size 0 or Size 1 in Hyderabad, gelatin capsules IP grade, or coloured capsule shells for nutraceuticals? Contact Surravi Phharma at +91 8008002576 or WhatsApp for pricing, size availability, and COA.
